title: OnOptions
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from OnOptions, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: ‘It was like this little gift that fell in my lap’: Millions of Americans may soon discover they’ve been Canadian all along
items.description: If you have a grandparent, great-grandparent or even more distant ancestor from Canada, you could be Canadian.
